title: Polished Chrome Bath Sink Plug Drain Stopper 1 3/4' 45mm Plug with 18' 450mm Ball Chain Bathroom Toilet Kitchen (1 3/4 Inch 45mm with Chain)
features: Universal Fit: 1.75-inch (45mm) plug diameter suitable for most standard bath drains.
The 18-inch (450mm) ball chain with connector allows for convenient operation,
Durable Construction: Designed for longevity with corrosion-resistant chrome metal.
Watertight Seal: Quality corrosion-resistant metal plug sits firmly inside the drain hole, providing a secure watertight seal.
Versatile Bath Plug: Polished chrome finish enhances modern or traditional bathroom suites; allows efficient filling and draining of baths.
A pair of pliers or strong fingers is all that is needed to fit this quality plug.
description: Elevate your bathroom's aesthetic with this polished chrome bath plug stopper. Crafted from high-quality, corrosion-resistant metal, it ensures longevity and complements both modern and traditional bathroom suites. The 18-inch (450mm) ball chain with connector allows for convenient operation, enabling efficient filling and draining of your bathtub. Designed to fit snugly inside the drain hole, this 1.75-inch (45mm) plug provides a watertight seal, preventing water leakage. Versatile and practical, it can also be utilised in sinks or toilets throughout your home. Upgrade your bathroom experience with this durable and stylish plug drain stopper.
